capability_declaration.evidence: IEC 61850 Part 7 (Logical Nodes & Data Objects) and Part 6 SCL
capability_declaration.rationale: Structural data models explicitly define device capabilities via Logical Node classes and XML configuration files. However they are static declarations rather than dynamic runtime discovery mechanisms suitable for autonomous agents.

bounded_authority.evidence: Part 7-3 Control Service with Select-Before-Operate mechanism
bounded_authority.rationale: SBO provides implicit operational boundaries and access control during remote commands, but lacks explicit time-limited permissions or revocation workflows needed for autonomous DER agent operations.

decision_auditability.rationale: Device-level event logging and control status feedback can form basic audit trails if centralized at EMS/DMS level. Not explicitly designed for AI dispatch decision attribution across distributed autonomous systems.

data_governance.rationale: Standard focuses on deterministic substation communication without addressing data ownership, third-party consent frameworks or retention policies relevant to AI-driven DER operations and market participation.
